app.title: Dependabot version updates introduce default package cooldown
app.author: woodruffw
app.description: Dependabot is a GitHub feature that helps you stay on top of Dependabot alerts and resolve vulnerabilities.
proposed_tests: create a sample repository, install Dependabot, run a version update, measure cooldown time
